hero.title: Find love
hero.subtitle: Join thousands of singles and connect with people who share your values. Shokii, the dating app that truly represents you.

features.title: Some Features
features.subtitle: Discover all the features that make Shokii the must-have dating app of the moment.

cards.title: Profile Creation
cards.description: Create an attractive profile with your photos and description to attract people who share your values.

cards.title: Browse & Matching
cards.description: Discover profiles near you and match with people who like you mutually.

cards.title: Custom Search
cards.description: Find profiles according to your preferences: age, location, interests and more.

cards.title: Incognito Mode
cards.description: Browse discreetly and control who can see your profile.

cards.title: Private Messaging
cards.description: Chat safely with your matches and get to know each other before meeting.

cards.title: Real Life Meetings
cards.description: Enjoy special offers in partner restaurants and clubs to meet your matches.

cards.title: Events
cards.description: Buy tickets for events and meetups organized by Shokii and its partners.

cards.title: Live & Content
cards.description: Participate in live sessions and discover social content to exchange and make new connections.

cards.title: Advanced Search
cards.description: Let us help you find your perfect partner.

about.title: About
about.description1: Shokii is a dating app designed to connect singles in Africa and help them find love, make new connections, and build real relationships.
about.description2: With more than 1,000,000 active users, Shokii brings together a dynamic community of single men and women looking for authentic relationships.
about.description3: The app is available in French, English, Spanish and Portuguese, to facilitate connections between different cultures.
about.description4: Thanks to an intelligent algorithm and advanced security tools, we offer a simple, secure, and pleasant dating experience. Join Shokii and start your story today.

cards.title: Secure
cards.description: Your data is protected and secure at all times.

cards.title: Easy to use
cards.description: An intuitive and pleasant interface for all users.

cards.title: Community
cards.description: Join an active and supportive community.

cards.title: Real Dates
cards.description: Access special offers at partner restaurants and clubs to meet your matches and share real moments together.

steps.title: Sign up and create profile
steps.description: Create your account in minutes and complete your profile to start meeting people.

steps.title: Search and matching
steps.description: Browse profiles and find people who match your criteria thanks to our algorithm.

steps.title: Chat and meetups
steps.description: Exchange messages and organize real meetings with your matches.

download.title: Download now
download.subtitle: Join us on our mobile app. Create an account for free and start finding love today.

testimonials.title: Thousands of connections have started on Shokii, and some have become true love stories.
testimonials.subtitle: What if the next connection is yours?

cards.text: I found my soulmate on Shokii! The app is super easy to use.

why.title: Why buy KISS?
why.subtitle: KISS gives you access to a world of possibilities on Shokii.
